==Biography==
===2015 Season===
Kim "'''dan'''" Seung-hoo joined the new [[Prime Clan]] early in 2015 as their AD carry. They qualified for [[SBENU Champions Summer 2015]] after going 1-1 in their group against [[Samsung Galaxy]] and [[Xenics]] during [[Champions Summer 2015/Promotion|Champions Summer 2015 Promotion]]. Afterwards, Prime was sponsored by SBENU and renamed themselves to [[SBENU Sonicboom]]. Dan shares the starting AD carry position with [[Nuclear]]. SBENU placed last in Champions Summer and were forced to play in the [[LCK/2016 Season/Spring Promotion|LCK 2016 Season Spring Promotion]]. SBENU played [[ESC Ever|Ever]] and managed to win 3-1 to requalify for the LCK, however dan didn't play in these games.
